name: Banana-Green Mango Chutney
recipeIngredient: You May Substitute 3/4 Tbsp Salt And Freshly Cracked Allspice
recipeInstructions:
1. Use this basic chutney with your very spicy hot dishes.
2. Yield: About 5 Cups
3. Heat the oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add the onion and saute until clear, about 4 to 5 minutes.
4. Add the mango slices and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
5. Stir in the vinegar and orange juice, then bring to a simmer.
6. Simmer gently for 10 more minutes.
7. Mix in all remaining ingredients: ginger, raisins, brown sugar, serrano peppers (or the salt and allspice substitution), and mix well.
8. Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature.
9. Serve or store in a covered container in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.
